012345670123456701234567012345670123456701234567012345670123456701234567012345670123
342146342446254651432431464747612436346146537614713761243616342646544634416652463175
777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777777

if (animationCurrentFrame >= animationFrameCount){
            Serial.println(animationCurrentFrame);
            animationCurrentFrame = 0;
        }
